titleEn: Targan announces sale to Merck Animal Health
titleZh: Targan宣布出售给默克动物保健公司
summaryZh: Targan公司宣布将被默克动物保健收购。Targan的核心技术包括高速性别识别系统WingScan™（每小时处理16万只雏鸡）和精准眼部喷雾疫苗技术，这些技术已在商业孵化场应用，能显著提升家禽生产性能。收购后，默克将整合Targan的生物设备能力，扩大其在全球家禽领域的生物制药和数字化解决方案布局，为智慧畜牧行业带来从孵化到养殖的全链条自动化升级。
featuredReason: 该收购事件标志着传统动保巨头与智能生物设备初创企业的深度融合，WingScan™性别识别和精准喷雾技术代表了家禽孵化环节自动化和AI应用的最新突破，对智慧畜牧从业者具有直接的技术参考和战略启示价值。
contentFull: Company News Targan announces sale to Merck Animal Health Targan’s innovative high-speed biodevice technology, including its gender identification product WingScan™, delivers enhanced poultry performance 15 June 2026 2 minute read By: TARGAN North America TARGAN Inc, a privately held innovator in developing and commercializing biodevice solutions to improve performance outcomes for the poultry industry, today announced that it has signed a definitive agreement to be acquired by Merck Animal Health, known as MSD Animal Health outside of the United States and Canada, a division of Merck & Co., Inc., Rahway, N.J., USA (NYSE:MRK), for an undisclosed purchase price. Merck Animal Health has invested in TARGAN since 2017 and has been one of the company’s largest shareholders.The proposed acquisition is expected to be completed in the third quarter of 2026, subject to approvals from applicable regulatory authorities and other customary closing conditions.“The acquisition of TARGAN’s best-in-class biodevice technology for use in commercial hatcheries complements and accelerates our growing biopharmaceutical presence in poultry and increases our ability to deliver significant customer value globally,” said Rick DeLuca, President, Merck Animal Health. “Additionally, TARGAN brings device development capabilities that will further strengthen our ability to provide animal health solutions across species. This transaction, coupled with our commercial and scientific expertise, is another example of how we deliver meaningful innovation to our customers while creating new opportunities for the future.”Upon closing, the acquisition is expected to broaden Merck Animal Health’s portfolio in commercial poultry operations with WingScan™, an automated solution that uses vision technology to identify and sort chicks by gender, processing up to 160,000 chicks per hour. The technology, which can scale to any size hatchery operation, captures high-resolution images of each chick’s feathers and analyzes them in real-time using advanced engineering capabilities and proprietary algorithms.This acquisition also brings the capability of high-speed precision ocular spray technology, which administers respiratory and coccidiosis vaccines, among others, to day-old chicks. Additionally, TARGAN has the potential to develop additional biodevices within poultry and other livestock species, which may shape the next frontier in the animal health industry.TARGAN Founder and CEO Ramin Karimpour said, “Merck Animal Health has been a foundational partner of TARGAN since our inception through its belief and commitment to scientific excellence and a common goal of bringing technological innovation to the livestock industry. Through this proposed acquisition, TARGAN will be able to access resources and infrastructure of Merck Animal Health, which will be critical in deploying TARGAN’s innovative biodevice technology along with Merck Animal Health’s broad portfolio of poultry vaccines for customers.”TARGAN notably wishes to thank its supporters, customers and Board of Director members over the years, who have made valuable contributions to the growth of its business, including all of its employees and its investors and debt finance providers: Merck Animal Health Ventures, Mountain Group Partners, NovaQuest Capital Management, Oval Park Capital, Symbiotic Capital and Live Oak Bank.BofA Securities, Inc. is serving as TARGAN’s exclusive financial advisor and Davis Polk & Wardwell LLP is serving as TARGAN’s legal advisor in connection with the transaction. Sponsored Article Targan Our Partners World Poultry Science Association Congress Poultry Science Association Targan dsm-firmenich Lallemand Lanxess BioZyme Hy-Line International TARGAN More from this author More News View all Aviagen and Nippon Chunky strengthen long-term relationship in Japan Company News 2 July 2026 1 minute read US declines to extend USMCA, beginning 10-year wind down Markets & policy Market trends Markets and economics 2 July 2026 4 minute read Farm groups warn deal is critical to agricultural exports Chicken sticks enter US snack market as turkey output falls Markets & policy Market trends 2 July 2026 1 minute read HPAI and disease pressure contracting turkey supply, CoBank says Sponsored Article Targan Our Partners World Poultry Science Association Congress Poultry Science Association Targan dsm-firmenich Lallemand Lanxess BioZyme Hy-Line International
translationZh:
Targan公司，一家在开发商业化生物设备解决方案以改善家禽产业绩效成果方面的私营创新企业，今日宣布已签署最终协议，将被默克动物保健公司收购。默克动物保健在美国和加拿大以外地区称为MSD动物保健，是默克公司（Merck & Co., Inc.，总部位于美国新泽西州拉威，纽交所代码：MRK）的一个部门。收购价格未公开。默克动物保健自2017年起投资Targan，并一直是该公司的主要股东之一。

拟议的收购预计将于2026年第三季度完成，但须获得相关监管机构的批准并满足其他惯例成交条件。

**默克动物保健总裁Rick DeLuca表示：**“收购Targan用于商业孵化场的顶级生物设备技术，补充并加速了我们在家禽领域不断增长的生物制药业务，并增强了我们在全球范围内为客户提供重大价值的能力。此外，Targan带来了设备开发能力，将进一步强化我们跨物种提供动物健康解决方案的能力。这笔交易，结合我们的商业和科学专长，是我们如何为客户提供有意义创新、同时为未来创造新机遇的又一例证。”

收购完成后，预计将扩大默克动物保健在商业家禽运营中的产品组合，引入WingScan™——一种利用视觉技术识别和按性别分拣雏鸡的自动化解决方案，每小时可处理多达16万只雏鸡。该技术可扩展至任何规模的孵化场，通过捕捉每只雏鸡羽毛的高分辨率图像，并利用先进的工程能力和专有算法进行实时分析。

此次收购还带来了高速精准眼部喷雾技术的能力，该技术可对一日龄雏鸡施用呼吸道疫苗和球虫病疫苗等。此外，Targan还有潜力开发家禽及其他牲畜物种的额外生物设备，这可能塑造动物健康产业的下一个前沿。

**Targan创始人兼首席执行官Ramin Karimpour表示：**“默克动物保健自我们成立以来一直是Targan的基础合作伙伴，通过其对科学卓越的信念和承诺，以及将技术创新引入畜牧业的共同目标。通过这项拟议的收购，Targan将能够获得默克动物保健的资源和基础设施，这对于部署Targan的创新生物设备技术以及默克动物保健广泛的家禽疫苗产品组合至关重要。”
contentHtml:
Targan announces sale to Merck Animal Health 
Targan’s innovative high-speed biodevice technology, including its gender identification product WingScan™, delivers enhanced poultry performance
